papers.title: A Unified Electrostatic-to-Spin Framework for Asymmetric Multi-Gate CMOS Quantum Devices
papers.summary: In advanced complementary metal-oxide-semiconductor (CMOS) quantum chips, compact gate stacks make it difficult to connect lithographic geometry, electrostatic confinement and many-electron spin filling in one transparent model. This connection is central to design-technology co-optimization (DTCO). Here we develop a reduced-order analytical framework for asymmetric multigate silicon quantum-dot devices. Its electrostatic core, the Poisson-kernel coupled-interface Green-function (PK-GF) model, agrees with an independent finite-volume solution at the millivolt scale for the matched two-dimensional problem, without fitting to that solution. We then pass the gate-derived confinement, rather than a harmonic or fitted potential, to a spin-valley many-body calculation for a jellybean quantum dot with N = 2-17 electrons at B = 5 T. The unrestricted Hartree-Fock (UHF) solution supports occupation-dependent, Wigner-molecule-like charge localization but likely overestimates spin polarization. Complete active-space configuration interaction (CASCI) supports a low-spin branch within the tested active spaces, which aligns with the experiments. The workflow therefore connects CMOS layout, device electrostatics, and potential-determined quantum observables, providing an auditable modelling layer for CMOS-based qubit design and DTCO.
papers.abstract_cn: 在先进互补金属—氧化物—半导体（complementary metal-oxide-semiconductor, CMOS）量子芯片中，紧凑的栅堆叠使得难以在一个清晰模型中将光刻几何结构、电静态限域和多电子自旋填充联系起来。这种联系是设计—技术协同优化（design-technology co-optimization, DTCO）的核心。本文为非对称多栅硅量子点器件建立了一种降阶解析框架。其电静态核心，即泊松核耦合界面格林函数（Poisson-kernel coupled-interface Green-function, PK-GF）模型，对于相匹配的二维问题，无需对独立有限体积解进行拟合，即可在毫伏量级上与该解一致。随后，我们将由栅极产生的限域，而不是谐波势或拟合势，输入到一个 jellybean 形量子点的自旋—谷多体计算中，其中电子数 N = 2–17，磁场 B = 5 T。非限制性 Hartree-Fock（unrestricted Hartree-Fock, UHF）解支持占据依赖的、类似 Wigner 分子的电荷局域化，但可能高估自旋极化。完全活性空间组态相互作用（complete active-space configuration interaction, CASCI）在所测试的活性空间内支持低自旋分支，这与实验结果一致。因此，该工作流将 CMOS 版图、器件电静态和由势决定的量子可观测量联系起来，为基于 CMOS 的量子比特设计和 DTCO 提供了一层可审计的建模框架。
papers.abstract_zh: 在先进互补金属—氧化物—半导体（complementary metal-oxide-semiconductor, CMOS）量子芯片中，紧凑的栅堆叠使得难以在一个清晰模型中将光刻几何结构、电静态限域和多电子自旋填充联系起来。这种联系是设计—技术协同优化（design-technology co-optimization, DTCO）的核心。本文为非对称多栅硅量子点器件建立了一种降阶解析框架。其电静态核心，即泊松核耦合界面格林函数（Poisson-kernel coupled-interface Green-function, PK-GF）模型，对于相匹配的二维问题，无需对独立有限体积解进行拟合，即可在毫伏量级上与该解一致。随后，我们将由栅极产生的限域，而不是谐波势或拟合势，输入到一个 jellybean 形量子点的自旋—谷多体计算中，其中电子数 N = 2–17，磁场 B = 5 T。非限制性 Hartree-Fock（unrestricted Hartree-Fock, UHF）解支持占据依赖的、类似 Wigner 分子的电荷局域化，但可能高估自旋极化。完全活性空间组态相互作用（complete active-space configuration interaction, CASCI）在所测试的活性空间内支持低自旋分支，这与实验结果一致。因此，该工作流将 CMOS 版图、器件电静态和由势决定的量子可观测量联系起来，为基于 CMOS 的量子比特设计和 DTCO 提供了一层可审计的建模框架。

papers.title: High-temperature operation of III-nitride high-electron-mobility transistors
papers.summary: High-electron-mobility transistors (HEMTs) made with III-nitride materials are of potential use in high-temperature electronic applications including power electronics, communications, aerospace and space exploration. However, the demands of such applications make it essential to understand the thermal limits and performance evolution of III-nitride HEMTs. Here, we analyze the high-temperature operation of III-nitride HEMTs, examining the impact on material properties, device structure, and circuit-level behavior. We explore the role of critical device layers - including barrier and channel engineering, substrate selection, and passivation strategies - in mitigating high-temperature-induced effects, and evaluate the thermal stability of III-nitride HEMTs in logic, radiofrequency, and power electronics applications. We also highlight key remaining challenges in the design and optimization of III-nitride devices for high-temperature applications.
papers.abstract_cn: 采用 III 族氮化物材料制成的高电子迁移率晶体管（high-electron-mobility transistors, HEMTs）在高温电子应用中具有潜在用途，包括功率电子、通信、航空航天和空间探索。然而，这类应用的需求使得理解 III 族氮化物 HEMT 的热极限和性能演化变得至关重要。本文分析了 III 族氮化物 HEMT 的高温工作，考察高温对材料性质、器件结构和电路级行为的影响。我们探讨了关键器件层——包括势垒和沟道工程、衬底选择以及钝化策略——在缓解高温诱导效应中的作用，并评估了 III 族氮化物 HEMT 在逻辑、射频和功率电子应用中的热稳定性。我们还强调了面向高温应用的 III 族氮化物器件设计与优化中仍然存在的关键挑战。
papers.abstract_zh: 采用 III 族氮化物材料制成的高电子迁移率晶体管（high-electron-mobility transistors, HEMTs）在高温电子应用中具有潜在用途，包括功率电子、通信、航空航天和空间探索。然而，这类应用的需求使得理解 III 族氮化物 HEMT 的热极限和性能演化变得至关重要。本文分析了 III 族氮化物 HEMT 的高温工作，考察高温对材料性质、器件结构和电路级行为的影响。我们探讨了关键器件层——包括势垒和沟道工程、衬底选择以及钝化策略——在缓解高温诱导效应中的作用，并评估了 III 族氮化物 HEMT 在逻辑、射频和功率电子应用中的热稳定性。我们还强调了面向高温应用的 III 族氮化物器件设计与优化中仍然存在的关键挑战。

Focus: 晶体管.

Context: High-temperature operation of III-nitride high-electron-mobility transistors.

papers.title: Monolithic GaN Systems Combining Non-Volatile Memory and Analog Computing via Area-Ratio-Engineered Ferroelectric AlScN Gate Stacks
papers.summary: Gallium nitride (GaN) transistors have become the platform of choice for power electronics and radio-frequency power amplifiers. To unlock capabilities beyond those of conventional GaN, integrating ferroelectric heterostructure has been considered toward memory, logic and reconfigurable systems. Here, we demonstrate ferroelectric GaN transistors employing an AlScN-based gate stack in which systematic engineering of the area-ratio (SMIS/SMFM) provides unified control over both memory and analog functionality. Precise modulation of the intermediate electrode length yields a record memory window of 27 V and a forward subthreshold swing of 27 mV/dec, driven by ferroelectric polarization reversal of a robust downward-polarization state pre-induced by two-dimensional electron gas. Low area-ratio devices (SMIS/SMFM = 1, 2) achieve 4-bit multi-level cell operation and excellent spatial uniformity across a fabricated 4 x 4 array, benchmarking favorably against established silicon and oxide ferroelectric architectures. High area-ratio devices (SMIS/SMFM = 4, 8) harness continuously tunable conductance states to demonstrate multi-state inverters and the first GaN-based ferroelectric frequency-to-voltage converter, delivering a linear frequency-voltage response across 0.5 - 500 Hz range with a conversion gain of 1.1 mV/Hz. This work establishes routes towards monolithically integrated GaN systems that combine non-volatile memory and analog signal processing on a platform inherently suited to high-power and radio-frequency applications.
papers.abstract_cn: 氮化镓（GaN）晶体管已成为功率电子和射频功率放大器的首选平台。为实现超越传统 GaN 器件的功能，人们一直在考虑集成铁电异质结构，以用于存储、逻辑和可重构系统。本文展示了采用 AlScN 基栅堆叠的铁电 GaN 晶体管，其中通过对面积比（SMIS/SMFM）进行系统工程化设计，可对存储和模拟功能实现统一控制。通过精确调制中间电极长度，获得了创纪录的 27 V 存储窗口和 27 mV/dec 的正向亚阈值摆幅，这由二维电子气预先诱导的稳健向下极化态发生铁电极化反转所驱动。低面积比器件（SMIS/SMFM = 1, 2）实现了 4-bit 多级单元工作，并在制备的 4 x 4 阵列中表现出优异的空间均匀性，相较于成熟的硅和氧化物铁电架构具有良好的基准性能。高面积比器件（SMIS/SMFM = 4, 8）利用连续可调的电导态，展示了多态反相器以及首个基于 GaN 的铁电频率—电压转换器，在 0.5–500 Hz 范围内实现线性频率—电压响应，转换增益为 1.1 mV/Hz。本工作确立了单片集成 GaN 系统的发展路径，可在一个本征适用于高功率和射频应用的平台上结合非易失存储与模拟信号处理。
papers.abstract_zh: 氮化镓（GaN）晶体管已成为功率电子和射频功率放大器的首选平台。为实现超越传统 GaN 器件的功能，人们一直在考虑集成铁电异质结构，以用于存储、逻辑和可重构系统。本文展示了采用 AlScN 基栅堆叠的铁电 GaN 晶体管，其中通过对面积比（SMIS/SMFM）进行系统工程化设计，可对存储和模拟功能实现统一控制。通过精确调制中间电极长度，获得了创纪录的 27 V 存储窗口和 27 mV/dec 的正向亚阈值摆幅，这由二维电子气预先诱导的稳健向下极化态发生铁电极化反转所驱动。低面积比器件（SMIS/SMFM = 1, 2）实现了 4-bit 多级单元工作，并在制备的 4 x 4 阵列中表现出优异的空间均匀性，相较于成熟的硅和氧化物铁电架构具有良好的基准性能。高面积比器件（SMIS/SMFM = 4, 8）利用连续可调的电导态，展示了多态反相器以及首个基于 GaN 的铁电频率—电压转换器，在 0.5–500 Hz 范围内实现线性频率—电压响应，转换增益为 1.1 mV/Hz。本工作确立了单片集成 GaN 系统的发展路径，可在一个本征适用于高功率和射频应用的平台上结合非易失存储与模拟信号处理。

papers.title: Classical Reversible Computation by Quantum Coherence
papers.summary: Rising energy demand from data-centre and AI applications has renewed interest in reversible computation, where logic need not dissipate heat at every step if information is uncomputed. Implementations have so far been classical: adiabatic CMOS reduces dissipation by slowing charge motion but is still limited by the threshold physics of transistors. Here we propose classical reversible logic implemented by coherent spin dynamics in a spin quantum-dot array, with inputs and outputs in classical basis states and no algorithmic use of superposition. The same spin stores, transports, and computes, with unitary rotation replacing irreversible switching. The universal building block is an iToffoli gate driven by DC voltage pulses and anisotropic exchange in Ge/Si hole spins. Simulations with experimental parameters reproduce the Toffoli truth table and yield a testable error landscape. Because shuttling transports the bit without measurement, logic and data movement remain reversible until readout. Millivolt pulses on femtofarad gates yield a gate energy below the 4~K Landauer scale, about five (eight) orders of magnitude below a room-temperature CMOS Toffoli with (without) 4 K cooling overhead. The same semiconductor hardware is therefore dual-use, supporting quantum algorithms when superposition is used and classical reversible logic otherwise.
papers.abstract_cn: 数据中心和 AI 应用不断增长的能耗需求重新激发了人们对可逆计算的兴趣；在可逆计算中，如果信息被反计算，则逻辑并不需要在每一步都耗散热量。迄今为止的实现都是经典的：绝热 CMOS 通过减缓电荷运动来降低耗散，但仍受晶体管阈值物理限制。本文提出一种由自旋量子点阵列中的相干自旋动力学实现的经典可逆逻辑，其输入和输出均为经典基态，并且在算法层面不使用叠加。同一个自旋负责存储、传输和计算，以幺正旋转替代不可逆开关。通用构建模块是由直流电压脉冲和 Ge/Si 空穴自旋中的各向异性交换驱动的 iToffoli 门。采用实验参数的仿真再现了 Toffoli 真值表，并给出了可测试的误差图景。由于穿梭传输在不进行测量的情况下传输比特，逻辑和数据移动在读出之前都保持可逆。施加在飞法拉级栅极上的毫伏脉冲使门能量低于 4 K Landauer 尺度，约比室温 CMOS Toffoli 门在计入 4 K 冷却开销时低五个数量级，在不计入该开销时低八个数量级。因此，同一套半导体硬件具有双重用途：当使用叠加时支持量子算法，否则支持经典可逆逻辑。

papers.title: Out-of-plane Ruddlesden–Popper ferroelectrics catch a break
papers.summary: Nature Electronics, Published online: 06 July 2026; doi:10.1038/s41928-026-01665-6 By breaking the symmetry of a Ruddlesden–Popper ferroelectric material, an out-of-plane dielectric material with high tunability and low loss can be fabricated.
papers.abstract_cn: 《Nature Electronics》，在线发表：2026 年 7 月 6 日；doi:10.1038/s41928-026-01665-6。通过打破 Ruddlesden–Popper 铁电材料的对称性，可以制备具有高可调性和低损耗的面外介电材料。
papers.abstract_zh: 《Nature Electronics》，在线发表：2026 年 7 月 6 日；doi:10.1038/s41928-026-01665-6。通过打破 Ruddlesden–Popper 铁电材料的对称性，可以制备具有高可调性和低损耗的面外介电材料。

papers.title: Physical aging of glasses of an organic semiconductor
papers.summary: All glasses, including organic semiconductor glasses, are non-equilibrium materials whose properties will change with time. This physical aging process is poorly understood for organic semiconductors, hindering the rational design of highly durable devices. In this study, we investigated the volume and enthalpy recovery processes in both thin films and bulk glasses of N,N'-Bis(3-methylphenyl)-N,N'-diphenylbenzidine (TPD). Our results revealed that volume recovery kinetics exhibit negligible dependence on film thickness for liquid-cooled TPD films between 400 nm and 100 nm. Additionally, the volume recovery process in TPD films was strongly coupled to the enthalpy recovery observed in bulk TPD glasses during annealing near the glass transition temperature. Remarkably, TPD films prepared by physical vapor deposition at room temperature demonstrated exceptional resistance to physical aging, with an aging rate approximately one order of magnitude lower than that of their liquid-cooled counterparts. These results not only enhance our understanding of the non-equilibrium dynamics in amorphous systems but also offer valuable insights for the design of next-generation organic devices with significantly improved stability and durability.
papers.abstract_cn: 所有玻璃态材料，包括有机半导体玻璃，都是非平衡材料，其性质会随时间发生变化。对于有机半导体而言，这种物理老化过程尚未得到充分理解，从而阻碍了高耐久器件的合理设计。在本研究中，我们考察了 N,N'-双(3-甲基苯基)-N,N'-二苯基联苯胺（TPD）薄膜和块体玻璃中的体积恢复与焓恢复过程。结果表明，对于厚度介于 400 nm 和 100 nm 之间、由液体冷却制备的 TPD 薄膜，其体积恢复动力学对膜厚的依赖可以忽略。此外，TPD 薄膜中的体积恢复过程与块体 TPD 玻璃在玻璃化转变温度附近退火时观察到的焓恢复强烈耦合。值得注意的是，在室温下通过物理气相沉积制备的 TPD 薄膜表现出优异的抗物理老化能力，其老化速率比由液体冷却制备的对应薄膜低约一个数量级。这些结果不仅增进了我们对非晶体系中非平衡动力学的理解，也为设计稳定性和耐久性显著提高的下一代有机器件提供了宝贵认识。

papers.title: Polycrystalline ferroelectric croconic acid for multisource environmental energy harvesting
papers.summary: The development of organic ferroelectric materials through scalable and simplified fabrication routes remains a major challenge for next-generation energy-harvesting technologies. Here, polycrystalline croconic acid (CA) thin films are fabricated by vacuum sublimation onto Ar plasma-treated flexible substrates and stabilized by in situ encapsulation with an adamantane-based remote plasma polymer. This solvent-free strategy effectively suppresses surface degradation under ambient conditions, providing long-term stability. Piezoresponse force microscopy confirms robust ferroelectricity with an oblique polarization orientation, well-defined domains, and low nanoscale coercive fields. The films were integrated into multilayer piezoelectric and pyroelectric devices. The piezoelectric performance strongly depends on film thickness, while embedding the CA layer between dielectric polymeric films significantly improves the macroscopic response, reaching power densities of up to 37 microW m-2 for ca. 2 micrometer CA films. Despite the common assumption that high crystallinity is required to sustain ferro-, piezo-, and pyroelectricity, these polycrystalline CA films exhibit remarkable RT pyroelectricity, a property not previously demonstrated in CA-based devices. A pyroelectric coefficient of ca. 10 microC m-2 K-1 highlights a functional response comparable to that of well-established organic and inorganic pyroelectric materials, demonstrating the potential of CA thin films for thermal energy harvesting. Beyond their functional performance, the proposed low-T fabrication route combines deposition and encapsulation in a single in situ process, simplifying device fabrication. Its compatibility with scalable vacuum technologies, flexible substrates, and further process optimization makes this approach highly promising for developing low-cost, lead-free, multisource energy-harvesting systems.
papers.abstract_cn: 通过可扩展且简化的制造路线开发有机铁电材料，仍是下一代能量采集技术面临的一项重大挑战。本文通过真空升华在经 Ar 等离子体处理的柔性衬底上制备多晶克罗康酸（croconic acid, CA）薄膜，并利用基于金刚烷的远程等离子体聚合物进行原位封装以实现稳定化。这种无溶剂策略能够有效抑制环境条件下的表面退化，从而提供长期稳定性。压电响应力显微镜证实了稳健的铁电性，表现为倾斜的极化取向、定义明确的畴以及较低的纳米尺度矫顽场。该薄膜被集成到多层压电和热释电器件中。压电性能强烈依赖于薄膜厚度，而将 CA 层嵌入介电聚合物薄膜之间可显著改善宏观响应；对于约 2 μm 厚的 CA 薄膜，功率密度最高达到 37 μW m^-2。尽管通常认为维持铁电性、压电性和热释电性需要较高结晶度，但这些多晶 CA 薄膜表现出显著的室温热释电性，而这一性质此前尚未在基于 CA 的器件中得到展示。约 10 μC m^-2 K^-1 的热释电系数表明，其功能响应可与成熟的有机和无机热释电材料相媲美，证明了 CA 薄膜用于热能采集的潜力。除功能性能外，所提出的低温制造路线将沉积和封装结合在单一原位工艺中，从而简化了器件制造。该方法与可扩展真空技术、柔性衬底和进一步工艺优化兼容，因此非常有望用于开发低成本、无铅、多源能量采集系统。
papers.abstract_zh: 通过可扩展且简化的制造路线开发有机铁电材料，仍是下一代能量采集技术面临的一项重大挑战。本文通过真空升华在经 Ar 等离子体处理的柔性衬底上制备多晶克罗康酸（croconic acid, CA）薄膜，并利用基于金刚烷的远程等离子体聚合物进行原位封装以实现稳定化。这种无溶剂策略能够有效抑制环境条件下的表面退化，从而提供长期稳定性。压电响应力显微镜证实了稳健的铁电性，表现为倾斜的极化取向、定义明确的畴以及较低的纳米尺度矫顽场。该薄膜被集成到多层压电和热释电器件中。压电性能强烈依赖于薄膜厚度，而将 CA 层嵌入介电聚合物薄膜之间可显著改善宏观响应；对于约 2 μm 厚的 CA 薄膜，功率密度最高达到 37 μW m^-2。尽管通常认为维持铁电性、压电性和热释电性需要较高结晶度，但这些多晶 CA 薄膜表现出显著的室温热释电性，而这一性质此前尚未在基于 CA 的器件中得到展示。约 10 μC m^-2 K^-1 的热释电系数表明，其功能响应可与成熟的有机和无机热释电材料相媲美，证明了 CA 薄膜用于热能采集的潜力。除功能性能外，所提出的低温制造路线将沉积和封装结合在单一原位工艺中，从而简化了器件制造。该方法与可扩展真空技术、柔性衬底和进一步工艺优化兼容，因此非常有望用于开发低成本、无铅、多源能量采集系统。

papers.title: Wafer-scale growth of highly stable p-type semiconducting monolayer MoSi<sub>2</sub>N<sub>4</sub> single crystals
papers.summary: Nature Materials, Published online: 08 July 2026; doi:10.1038/s41563-026-02669-5 Wafer-scale monolayer single crystals of p-type semiconducting MoSi2N4 are grown via chemical vapour deposition, and exhibit high mobility and stability.
papers.abstract_cn: 《Nature Materials》，在线发表：2026 年 7 月 8 日；doi:10.1038/s41563-026-02669-5。通过化学气相沉积生长出晶圆级 p 型半导体 MoSi2N4 单层单晶，并表现出高迁移率和高稳定性。
papers.abstract_zh: 《Nature Materials》，在线发表：2026 年 7 月 8 日；doi:10.1038/s41563-026-02669-5。通过化学气相沉积生长出晶圆级 p 型半导体 MoSi2N4 单层单晶，并表现出高迁移率和高稳定性。
